wallclock_breakdown: design 389.4s + inverse_folding 11.8s + folding 369.3s + design_folding 323.3s + analysis 162.8s = 1256.6s (full pipeline, single invocation; the optional filtering step 6/6 aborted on a missing config but runs after analysis and does not affect the scRMSD designability metric, which is read from the analysis CSV)
outliers: binder_6 at 6.67 A and binder_4 at 2.98 A are the two strict fails; the other 6/8 designs are <=2.02 A, with three <=0.91 A.
note: real reference output copied verbatim from the GPU run; not regenerated or edited. Independent invocation of the same official CLI as batch_a (BoltzGen has no --seed flag; each process is an independent draw, matching the device discipline).
